section_name: Suspension, Revocation, or Disqualification Effective Date
text:
(a) A license suspension under Section 521.292 (Department’s Determination for License Suspension) or revocation under Section 521.294 (Department’s Determination for License Revocation) takes effect on the 40th day after the date the person is considered to have received notice of the suspension or revocation under Section 521.295 (Notice of Department’s Determination) (b).

(b) A license disqualification under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a) takes effect on the 40th day after the date the person is considered to have received notice of the disqualification under Section 521.295 (Notice of Department’s Determination) (b), unless a disqualification is currently in effect. If a disqualification is currently in effect, the periods of disqualifications run consecutively.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.297 — Suspension, Revocation, or Disqualification Effective Date

(a) A license suspension under Section 521.292 (Department’s Determination for License Suspension) or revocation under Section 521.294 (Department’s Determination for License Revocation) takes effect on the 40th day after the date the person is considered to have received notice of the suspension or revocation under Section 521.295 (Notice of Department’s Determination) (b).

(b) A license disqualification under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a) takes effect on the 40th day after the date the person is considered to have received notice of the disqualification under Section 521.295 (Notice of Department’s Determination) (b), unless a disqualification is currently in effect. If a disqualification is currently in effect, the periods of disqualifications run consecutively.

*Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 424 (S.B.1372), Sec. 2, eff. January 1, 2008.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A license disqualification under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a) takes effect on the 40th day after the date the person is considered to have received notice of the disqualification under Section 521.295 (Notice of Department’s Determination) (b), unless a disqualification is currently in effect. If a disqualification is currently in effect, the periods of disqualifications run consecutively.
